settings.section1_text1: We're not just a brand — we're a mood, a mindset, a reminder that style should feel easy, fun and fully yours. AYVA was born out of Stockholm evenings and slow city walks, inspired by everyday cool girls, vintage archives, and the quiet power of contrast: soft but bold, timeless but now.
settings.section1_text2: We make bags and charms that do more than hold your things — they say something. Our mission is to bring you pieces that feel like you. Not fast fashion made in bulk. Not luxury with a thousand-euro price tag. Just well-made things you'll actually want to wear.
settings.section1_text3: Designed with love. Styled with attitude. Made to go with you everywhere.
settings.section2_text1: At AYVA, our mission is to make style feel personal again. We believe accessories should spark a small moment of joy, turn a head, and tell a story — without saying a word. We exist to make bags and charms that elevate the everyday; not just trends, but pieces with personality designed to move with you from Monday meetings to midnight walks.
settings.section2_text2: We're here for the ones who mix vintage with streetwear, minimalism with a twist, and confidence with a little bit of charm. Our goal is simple: to help you carry yourself, boldly.
settings.section2_text3: Designed to be noticed. Made to be loved. Worn your way.
